# resoluto-sandbox

Run any program or agent script in a sandbox. The program is plain (argv → stdout/files/exit) and never imports resoluto_sandbox. ONE SubstrateBackend drives both presets via an injected SandboxRuntime (Kata microVM via nerdctl + a dedicated containerd locally, Kata pod on k8s) and a Conduit (bind-mount locally, S3 on k8s).

## Key files

- README.md: Overview, 60-second quickstart, architecture diagrams, backends overview, Sandbox.run() reference, status table
- docs/backends.md: Backends detail (local + k8s), run flow diagrams, vendor-neutral k8s stack install guide
- docs/auth.md: Claude Max/Pro subscription auth for local and container runs
- spec/PROTOCOL.md: Language-neutral host ↔ sandbox wire protocol with JSON Schemas
- src/resoluto_sandbox/client.py: Sandbox and RunResult — the main public API
- src/resoluto_sandbox/cli.py: resoluto-sandbox run and doctor CLI subcommands
- src/resoluto_sandbox/conduit/: Conduit abstraction + LocalConduit/StdoutConduit/S3Conduit
- examples/01_local_hello.py: Minimal standalone program; shows both direct and Sandbox run commands
- examples/02_run_via_sandbox.py: Driver that runs 01_local_hello.py via Sandbox.run()
- examples/claude_agent.py: BYO Claude agent example (plain script, no resoluto_sandbox import)
- AGENTS.md: Power-user cheat-sheet for LLM coding agents working in this repo
